app.title: Global Airsoft App
app.startupFailedMessage: The app could not start. Please restart the app.
home.title: Home
home.discoveryPlaceholderMessage: Game discovery will be connected here next.
home.timelinePlaceholderMessage: Community timeline will be connected here next.
home.profilePreviewDescription: This profile uses mocked data until the account endpoint is connected.
home.profileLoadFailedMessage: Unable to load your profile right now.
home.profilePhotoUpdateFailedMessage: Unable to update your profile photo right now.
home.userMenuDescription: Manage your account settings and access from one place.
home.profileEditDescription: Update the public details shown on your account.
home.profileEditLoadFailedMessage: Unable to load your profile details right now.
home.profileEditUpdateFailedMessage: Unable to update your profile right now.
home.privacyDescription: Choose what appears on your account for other players.
home.privacyFullNameVisibleDescription: When disabled, your profile will prefer your username instead of your full name.
home.privacyFullNamePrivateDescription: Turn this on to hide your full name from other users.
home.privacyLoadFailedMessage: Unable to load your privacy settings right now.
home.privacyUpdateFailedMessage: Unable to update your privacy settings right now.
home.accountAccessDescription: Review how you sign in and resolve important account items in a few taps.
home.accountAccessEmptySectionMessage: No information is available right now.
home.accountAccessEmailVerifiedDescripti: Your email is confirmed and helps with secure account recovery.
home.accountAccessEmailUnverifiedDescrip: Confirm your email to avoid issues recovering or protecting your account.
home.accountAccessEmailNotConfiguredDesc: Add an email to receive important alerts and recover access securely.
home.accountAccessPhoneVerifiedDescripti: Your phone is confirmed and can help protect your account.
home.accountAccessPhoneUnverifiedDescrip: Verify your phone to keep this contact method trusted.
home.accountAccessPhoneNotConfiguredDesc: Add a phone number to have another safe way to recover your account.
home.accountAccessPasswordActiveDescript: You can sign in with your password whenever you prefer.
home.accountAccessPasswordNotConfiguredD: Set a password so you can sign in without depending on an external provider.
home.accountAccessGoogleConnectedDescrip: Your Google account is connected and ready for quick sign-in.
home.accountAccessGoogleNotConnectedDesc: Connect Google to sign in faster and reduce the risk of losing access.
home.accountAccessAppleConnectedDescript: Your Apple account is connected and ready for quick sign-in.
home.accountAccessAppleNotConnectedDescr: Connect Apple to sign in faster using your device.
home.accountAccessExternalConnectedDescr: This external provider is connected to your account.
home.accountAccessExternalNotConnectedDe: Connect this provider to have another safe sign-in option.
home.accountAccessUnknownDescription: We could not confirm this state right now. Refresh the screen or try again later.
home.accountAccessActionUnavailableMessa: This setting is not available in the app yet.
home.accountAccessLoadFailedMessage: Unable to load account access information right now.
home.logoutConfirmMessage: You will need to sign in again to continue using the app.
home.logoutErrorMessage: Unable to sign out right now. Please try again.
device.registrationEmptyResponse: Device registration returned an empty response.
device.registrationInvalidPayloadFormat: Device registration returned an invalid payload.
auth.loginSubtitle: Discover matches, connect with your squad, and get real-time updates from the community.
auth.googleSignInFailed: Unable to continue with Google. Please try again.
auth.logoutFailed: Unable to sign out. Please try again.
auth.sessionEndedForSecurityMessage: Your session ended for security reasons. Please sign in again.
auth.securityChangeDetectedMessage: We detected a security change. Please sign in again.
auth.permissionDeniedMessage: You do not have permission to access this resource.
auth.tooManyAttemptsMessage: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
auth.serverUnavailableMessage: We could not complete this right now. Please try again.
auth.passwordRecoverySubtitle: Enter your email to receive a secure password reset link.
auth.passwordRecoverySuccessMessage: We sent an email to {email} with your password reset link. Open your inbox and tap the link to continue. If it does not arrive in a few minutes, check spam or promotions.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Set up your profile and join the community to find games, teams, and new connections.
auth.googleAccountSetupSubtitle: Review the information provided by Google and make any changes you want before continuing.
auth.googleAccountSetupPhotoHint: Change the photo now or keep the one from Google.
auth.usernameRestrictionHint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, _ and . only. No spaces.
auth.usernameUnavailable: This username is already in use.
auth.usernameAvailabilityFailed: We could not check this username right now. You can still continue.
auth.loginFailed: Unable to log in. Please try again.
auth.signUpFailed: Unable to create the account. Please try again.
auth.passwordRecoveryFailed: Unable to send the password recovery email. Please try again.
notification.permissionPrePromptSubtitle: Enable notifications so you do not miss important activity.
notification.permissionPrePromptBenefitF: Get alerts when someone sends you a friend request.
notification.permissionPrePromptBenefitG: See events and matches near you.
notification.permissionPrePromptBenefitT: Receive invites from teams looking for players.
notification.permissionDeniedBody: To receive alerts about friend requests, games, and team invites, enable notifications in your device settings.
notification.channel.messagesDescription: Chat messages and direct conversation updates.
notification.channel.socialDescription: Friend requests and social activity updates.
notification.channel.othersDescription: General notifications that do not fit the Messages or Social channels.
common.discardChangesMessage: If you leave now, your unsaved changes will be lost.
common.genericApiErrorMessage: An error occurred. Please try again later.
validation.fullNameComplete: Enter a first and last name.
validation.passwordLetterAndNumber: Use one letter and one number.
validation.usernameLowercaseOnly: Use lowercase letters, numbers, _ and . only.

profilePhoto.cameraPreviewFailed: Unable to start the camera preview.
